_comment: Stage-4 design+interaction hook manifest. Mirrors design.solution structure with interaction.contract.yaml as the contract target and stage=interaction in the gate completion check.

hooks.purpose: Set interaction.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after interaction.md or interaction-spec edit.
Block harness gate/contract advance when interaction.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true.
Block harness mission stage complete interaction when gate has not passed.
